page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Peak calling tool for CLIP-seq data.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A supervised learning framework for chromatin loop detection in genome-wide contact maps. It can be used to visualize Hi-C, ChIA-PET, HiCHiP, PLAC-Seq, Capture Hi-C data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A supervised learning framework for chromatin loop detection in genome-wide contact maps. It can be used to visualize Hi-C, ChIA-PET, HiCHiP, PLAC-Seq, Capture Hi-C data.
